Meaning.En: A system of government in which the people have the authority to choose their governing legislation, typically through elected representatives.
Meaning.Example: Many countries around the world strive to build and maintain a stable democracy.

Situation.Vi: Bầu cử tự do, đa nguyên, và quyền công dân được tôn trọng.
Situation.En: Free and fair elections, pluralism, and respect for citizens' rights.

Situation.Vi: Chính phủ chịu trách nhiệm trước người dân và hoạt động minh bạch.
Situation.En: The government is accountable to the people and operates transparently.
